title: chore: remove 15 dead apps (2026-07-20)
author: pollinations-ai[bot]
pr_body_excerpt:
## Dead App Removal

These apps returned 404/410 in **all 3 check rounds** (5 min apart):

- SpiritPet World — Feature Overview | https://spiritworldfeatureoverview.netlify.app/
- AI Image Forge | https://hilarious-seahorse-09c5c6.netlify.app/
- CreatorPack AI | https://creatorpack.qhero.net/
- Storyframe Studio | https://storyframe-studio.web.app
- Persona AI Application | https://personaai.app/
- Pollinations Seed Plan Qualification | https://app-j.pl/Pollinations/
- ALL in One AI Tools | https://tools.zero2launch.io/
- Pollinations Avatar Gen | https://github.com/Nidelon/pollinations-avatar-gen
- SmartInfiniteYield | https://github.com/BokX1/InfiniteYieldWithAI
- P2S | https://github.com/Rakesh-ada/P2S
- AriaEren | https://ariaeren.com
- Sugen | https://sugen.puter.site/
- Flowgen | https://flowgen.puter.site/
- Avatar GenStudio | https://astudio-dcae4.web.app
- ii's Stupid Menu | https://github.com/iiDk-the-actual/iis.Stupid.Menu

Review before merging. Close this PR to keep all apps.

gist.headline: Garden bed cleared
gist.blurb: Fifteen long-offline community app links have been gently weeded from the directory after three separate checks. The garden is a little tidier; the living projects get more sunlight.
gist.summary: Removed 15 app entries from apps/APPS.md after each linked project returned 404 or 410 across three checks spaced five minutes apart.
gist.impact: The community app directory now points readers toward projects that are still reachable instead of listing these 15 retired or unavailable apps.
gist.visual_concept: A cozy community garden directory being tended: Polly carefully prunes a small row of wilted code-plants marked as unreachable, while healthy flowering app-plants remain in labeled pots beside a retro directory terminal. The scene represents curating a useful app garden rather than destroying projects.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly, the cute yellow-and-brown striped bee mascot with pink blush, light blue wings, and a tiny gardener hat, carefully pruning a few wilted code-plants beside a retro terminal showing a tidy app directory; healthy flower-filled code pots glow prominently lime green (#ecf874) nearby. Cozy 8-bit pixel art aesthetic, soft pastel gradients, warm lighting, retro gaming vibes like Stardew Valley, with subtle pixel-font text: "GARDEN TIDIED".
